content.claim: Government Decree 134/2016 restructured maintainer authority by creating 59 school district centers (tankerületi központok) subordinate to KLIK, with district councils having only advisory input and school directors appointed by the Minister of Education, not selected locally.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Legal and governance lens
limitations: Decree text not reproduced in notes
Specific employment-decision transfers from school directors to district directorates inferred from practitioner accounts rather than statutory text
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
